title: Synchronous vs Asynchronous
description: Understand the difference between blocking and non-blocking code.

slides.title: Synchronous Code – One at a Time ⏱️
Asynchronous Code – Non‑blocking ⚡

quizData.explanation: Even with 0ms delay, `setTimeout` schedules the callback to run after the current stack clears. So 'A', then 'C', then 'B'.
